steps.title: Connect the clause to the claim
steps.content: Morales claims that our understanding of walking decisions is not robust enough. The underlined portion then explains why: studies isolate factors such as norms or sidewalk width, but actual walking decisions involve multiple conditions at once.

steps.title: Reject mismatched functions
steps.content: Choice A invents a scholarly disagreement, but the studies are not shown to conflict. Choice B mentions methods, which the sentence never discusses. Choice D calls the clause an objection, but it supports Morales's claim. The underlined portion elaborates on the earlier claim. The answer is C.
